title: Alpha Earth Observation Catalog
summary: A catalog of earth observation datasets covering land cover and vegetation indices.

title: Beta Geospatial API
summary: STAC API serving satellite imagery and derived analytics products.

title: Climate Data Catalog
summary: Historical and projected climate variables at global scale.

title: DEM Elevation API
summary: Digital elevation models and terrain derivatives accessible via STAC API.

title: EuroSat Catalog
summary: European satellite imagery catalog with Sentinel-2 based land use classification.

title: Flood Monitoring API
summary: Near-real-time flood extent mapping from SAR imagery.

title: Geo Archive Catalog
summary: Long-term geospatial data archive spanning multiple decades.

title: Hydrology STAC API
summary: Hydrological datasets including river discharge and water body extent.

title: ICESat Altimetry Catalog
summary: ICESat-2 laser altimetry products for ice sheet and vegetation height.

title: Imagery Search API
summary: Multi-source optical and radar imagery search and discovery.

title: Japan DEM Catalog
summary: High-resolution digital elevation models for the Japanese archipelago.

title: Kelp Forest Monitoring API
summary: Kelp canopy area and biomass estimates derived from Landsat imagery.

title: Landsat Collection Catalog
summary: USGS Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 surface reflectance products.

title: Marine Observation API
summary: Ocean colour, sea surface temperature, and marine habitat datasets.

title: NDVI Time Series Catalog
summary: Global NDVI composites from MODIS and VIIRS sensors.
